request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are increasingly relying on our military to cover their defense needs? While we all want to support our friends, we can't ignore the fact that this imbalance is straining our own resources. It's time to have a serious conversation about fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
